title: Facilitate the development of group goals and projects
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Facilitate the development of group goals and projects demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Promote the identification of issues

pcs.text: Encourage group members to identify local issues within the context of the group activities and program scope
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Encourage group members to identify local issues within the context of the group activities and program scope?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage group members to identify local issues within the context of the group activities and program scope.

pcs.text: Identify issues in terms of problems, causes and actions required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify issues in terms of problems, causes and actions required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify issues in terms of problems, causes and actions required.

pcs.text: Provide opportunities for group members to learn about matters within program scope and to acquire additional related skills

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide opportunities for group members to learn about matters within program scope and to acquire additional related skills.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Facilitate group to develop potential action strategies for identified issues that comply with program scope.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure facilitation processes used are appropriate to the level of group development.
